mapper.insert: INSERT INTO purchase( user_no, base, base_sub, agency, store, user_id, user_name, user_grade, buy_price, buy_at, update_at ) VALUES( #{user_no}, #{base}, #{base_sub}, #{agency}, #{store}, #{user_id}, #{user_name}, #{user_grade}, #{buy_price}, #{buy_at}, now() )
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM purchase
AND id LIKE CONCAT('%',#{search_text},'%')
AND base_sub LIKE CONCAT('%',#{search_text},'%')
AND agency LIKE CONCAT('%',#{search_text},'%')
AND buy_at BETWEEN CAST(CONCAT(REPLACE(#{select_date},'.','-'),' 00:00:00') AS DATETIME) AND CAST(CONCAT(REPLACE(#{select_date},'.','-'),' 23:59:59') AS DATETIME)
LIMIT #{start} , #{page_row}
